arts.ttl: Inter vs. Fiorentina face each other once again
arts.sum: Inter have lost without scoring a Serie A match and conceding at least 3 goals (0-3 vs Fiorentina) for the first time since 2nd December 2016 (0-3 away vs Napoli with Stefano Pioli as manager). Fiorentina have won a home match against Inter without conceding goals (3-0) for the first time since 5th October 2014 (3-0 in that case with Vincenzo Montella as manager).

arts.sum: Change is in the air at Inter Milan. arts.ttl: Inter Milan’s Midfield Revolution: Sucic Secured, Nico Paz in Sights
arts.sum: Inter Milan are orchestrating a significant overhaul of their midfield, with a clear focus on injecting youth into the squad. The imminent arrival of Petar Sucic, who is expected in Milan tomorrow for medical examinations and to sign his contract, marks the beginning of this transformation. arts.ttl: Serie A | Inter v Fiorentina: Match Preview
arts.sum: Just four days after their surprising encounter in Florence, Inter Milan and Fiorentina are set to face off again in a highly anticipated Serie A clash at the San Siro on Monday evening.
